1.4.5.en: Added synced xComfort thermostat presets and room heating state, plus new temperature/humidity, door/window, and room status sensors with improved heater and button telemetry.

1.4.6.en: Removed room and temperature/humidity sensor device types and corrected the door/window sensor images.

1.4.7.en: Improved thermostat sensor sync and energy tracking, richer wall switch events, bridge diagnostics metadata, and better state restore after reconnect.

1.4.8.en: Fixed thermostat room sync and preset control, and corrected water sensor alarm reset syncing.

1.4.13.en: Adds thermostat heating preset Flow support, estimated thermostat power fallback, and water guard on/off control with corrected alarm sync.

1.4.14.en: Improves shading position/state sync, adds thermostat heating-demand parsing from bridge metadata, and adds extra xComfort bridge message compatibility.

1.4.17.en: removed energy reporting from devices that dont support it

1.4.21.en: Improved bridge state handling for wall switches and shading, added better direct update support, and improved metadata/home-data reliability.

1.4.22.en: Improved state syncing for actuators, shading, wall switches, and room updates, with better direct update handling from the bridge.

1.4.23.en: Fixed water sensor alarm state so Homey no longer shows a triggered alarm when the bridge reports no water alarm.

1.4.24.en: Fix WaterGuard alarm sync so opening the water valve no longer triggers a false alarm in Homey.

1.4.25.en: Fix thermostat power usage so partial xComfort updates no longer make Homey drop to 0 W while heating is still active.

1.4.26.en: Convert the remaining helper script to TypeScript and keep the update script runnable from the compiled build output.

1.4.28.en: Improved bridge reliability and thermostat handling, fixed combined state+metadata updates, and made dimming more responsive.

1.4.29.en: Added Binary Input, Temperature Sensor, and Motion Sensor support for additional xComfort sensor channels; improved door/window sensor detection using bridge component type mapping.

1.4.30.en: Added Room Status sensors with room temperature, humidity, heating demand, power, calculated room energy, lights-on counts, and open window/door counts; improved temperature/humidity pairing and thermostat heating demand visibility.

1.4.31.en: Added support for configuring multiple xComfort Bridges and pairing devices, room status sensors, and diagnostics from each bridge while keeping existing single-bridge devices compatible.

1.4.32.en: Improved bridge diagnostics by preserving full status across main power updates, added calculated main-meter energy, initialized multiple bridges in parallel, improved sensor pairing diagnostics, and added clearer wall switch pairing names.

1.4.33.en: Fixed pairing lists so already-installed devices are hidden when adding new devices, including legacy single-bridge devices and newer multi-bridge device IDs.

1.4.34.en: Added xComfort scenes, appliance/load support, updated binary input and motion classifications, remote access diagnostics, heating valve details, improved pairing speed, and slow background reconnect retries.

1.4.35.en: Updated motion and binary input artwork, improved motion sensor icon, and removed appliance and temperature sensor from new device pairing.

1.4.39.en: Improved actuator command reliability, fixed the motion sensor icon, and cleaned up the Add Device list metadata.

1.4.48.en: Restored stable actuator switching and added paced light command handling for safer bulk on/off actions.

1.4.49.en: Improved release validation and cleaned up lint warnings for a more reliable app build.

1.4.50.en: Improve actuator switching stability by preventing bridge command bursts during all-lights actions.

1.4.51.en: Improved actuator switching stability and bridge connection handling; reduced retry storms during busy bridge responses.

1.4.52.en: Restore Bridge Diagnostics as an addable device while keeping Room Status hidden from pairing.

1.4.53.en: Align README and metadata with current addable devices; clean up hidden legacy scene pairing.

1.4.54.en: Hide Bridge Diagnostics from the add-device pairing flow.

1.4.55.en: Add Weather Station and Energy Meter pairing, redacted settings diagnostics, broader xComfort model recognition, battery and signal metadata, and improved thermostat mode handling.

1.4.56.en: Expand Energy Meter and EMS support with current, voltage, pulse, tariff, cost, load-mode controls, richer pairing metadata, and advanced thermostat room details.

1.4.57.en: Hide Weather Station from new device pairing while keeping existing installed Weather Station devices supported.

1.4.58.en: Add Dutch App Store text and localized app description.

1.4.59.en: Add wall-switch double-press Flow triggers, broader device diagnostics, and richer xComfort energy tariff, currency, and history handling while keeping safe light command pacing.

1.4.60.en: Add bridge remote access control in settings and Flow, improve Push Button MultiSensor metadata parsing, and broaden xComfort energy history and tariff parsing.

1.4.61.en: Add dimming actuator behavior settings, an astro Flow condition for scene/room automations, richer scene metadata, and improved Energy Control meter/load pairing.

1.4.62.en: Add named bridge user/password login as an alternative to the existing device auth-key flow.

1.4.63.en: Add human-readable bridge app-info messages to improve logs and diagnostics for bridge-side errors.

1.4.64.en: Handle bridge component-info updates for fresher battery, signal, and mains metadata.

1.4.65.en: Handle bridge add, info, and delete lifecycle messages for fresher device, room, and component inventory.

1.4.66.en: Update the WebSocket dependency and developer tooling, exclude macOS metadata from Homey packages, and remove local lint suppressions.

1.4.67.en: Exclude unused pairing views for hidden legacy and internal drivers, and harden bridge settings normalization.

1.4.68.en: Align TypeScript Node typings with Homey's documented Node 22 runtime.

1.4.69.en: Add Dutch locale translations for the settings page and route bridge settings messages through Homey i18n.

1.4.70.en: Apply Homey i18n translations to static settings labels and await final energy-meter persistence during device deletion.

1.4.71.en: Add Dutch translations for active add-device pairing pages and exclude obsolete actuator and wall-switch pairing pages.

1.4.72.en: Add Dutch translations across settings, pairing, Flow cards, custom capabilities, driver names, and device settings, plus packaging cleanup for obsolete pairing views.
1.4.72.nl: Nederlandse vertalingen toegevoegd voor instellingen, toevoegen van apparaten, Flow-kaarten, aangepaste mogelijkheden, drivernamen en apparaatinstellingen, plus pakketopschoning voor verouderde koppelingspagina's.

1.4.73.en: Prevent duplicate device and room state listeners after bridge rebinds, and complete release metadata for recent cleanup builds.
1.4.73.nl: Voorkomt dubbele apparaat- en kamerstatuslisteners na bridge-herkoppelingen en vult releasemetadata aan voor recente opschoningsversies.

1.4.74.en: Broaden diagnostics redaction to remove user identity fields from raw support exports.
1.4.74.nl: Breidt diagnose-redactie uit zodat gebruikersidentiteitsvelden uit ruwe supportexports worden verwijderd.

1.4.75.en: Expand diagnostics redaction for alternate user identity, account, login, credential, and session fields.
1.4.75.nl: Breidt diagnose-redactie uit voor alternatieve gebruikers-, account-, login-, credential- en sessievelden.

1.4.76.en: Add Homey App Store xlarge image assets for the app and all manifest drivers.
1.4.76.nl: Voegt Homey App Store xlarge-afbeeldingen toe voor de app en alle manifestdrivers.

1.4.77.en: Reduce sensitive connection details in runtime logs.

1.4.78.en: Complete missing manifest driver icons and normalize all driver SVG icons to Homey's recommended 960x960 canvas.
1.4.78.nl: Vult ontbrekende manifest-drivericonen aan en normaliseert alle SVG-drivericonen naar het door Homey aanbevolen canvas van 960x960.

1.4.79.en: Clean up Flow card titles to better match Homey App Store wording guidelines.
1.4.79.nl: Schoont Flow-kaarttitels op zodat ze beter aansluiten op de Homey App Store-richtlijnen.

1.4.80.en: Add targeted development dependency overrides so full npm audit reports no vulnerabilities.
1.4.80.nl: Voegt gerichte overrides voor ontwikkelafhankelijkheden toe zodat volledige npm audit geen kwetsbaarheden meer meldt.

1.5.0.en: Adds a Bridge Status dashboard widget, a repair flow to update bridge credentials without re-pairing, battery info for battery-powered sensors in Homey Energy, energy approximation for non-metered lights, and a whole-home (cumulative) meter option for energy meters. Fixes shading position control: position support (shRuntime) is now stored correctly and existing shades self-heal from bridge data. Requires Homey v12.3.0 or newer.
1.5.0.nl: Voegt een Bridge-status dashboardwidget toe, een herstelflow om bridge-gegevens bij te werken zonder opnieuw te koppelen, batterij-informatie voor sensoren in Homey Energy, energie-benadering voor niet-gemeten verlichting en een hoofdmeter-optie (cumulatief) voor energiemeters. Herstelt positiebediening van zonwering: positie-ondersteuning (shRuntime) wordt nu correct opgeslagen en bestaande zonwering herstelt zichzelf via bridge-gegevens. Vereist Homey v12.3.0 of nieuwer.

1.5.1.en: Renames the Energy Meter whole-home setting ID so Homey no longer reports a reserved energy_ prefix warning.
1.5.1.nl: Hernoemt de instelling-ID voor de hoofdmeter van de Energiemeter zodat Homey geen waarschuwing meer meldt over de gereserveerde energy_-prefix.

1.5.2.en: Fixes shading position control by storing shRuntime correctly and restoring the position slider from live bridge data for already-paired shades.
1.5.2.nl: Herstelt positiebediening van zonwering door shRuntime correct op te slaan en de positieschuif voor bestaande zonwering via live bridge-data te herstellen.

1.6.0.en: Stability: declined-handshake reconnect fix, smoother settings saves, clean shutdown with energy flush. New: shading safety-lock alarm, energy history insights, scene button class, DE/NO/SV/DA translations.

1.7.0.en: New: Bridge connected/disconnected Flow triggers and condition, and a Dim room lights Flow action. Improvements: scene timer cleanup and fewer energy meter store writes.
